cards.name: Angmar
cards.quote: A land steeped in shadows, where the chill of the grave lingers.

cards.name: Rhudaur
cards.quote: Rhudaur keeps its watch in broken and haunted silence.

cards.name: Bay of Forochel
cards.quote: Frozen waters cradle the restless spirits of the North.

cards.name: TheNorthDowns
cards.quote: The North Downs stand as old sentinels over the road.

cards.name: Gúrthul
cards.quote: I am the harbinger of night, where hope dares not tread.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal a hidden artifact <sprite name="artifact"> on a visible hex.

cards.name: Seammu
cards.quote: The winds whisper my name; I am the storm's fury.
cards.actionEffect: Increase loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 10 on a random controlled settlement.

cards.name: Gwyllion
cards.quote: From the shadows I strike, unseen yet ever present.
cards.actionEffect: Conceal a random controlled settlement from enemies for 1 turn(s).

cards.name: Araudagul
cards.quote: Beneath the dark sky, my will commands the tide.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal the random enemy settlement for 1 turn(s).

cards.name: Murazor
cards.quote: In service to Sauron, I am his shadow and his sword.
cards.actionEffect: Apply Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (2 turns) to a random controlled character.

cards.name: Barrow-downs
cards.quote: Luglurak crouches over Nurn like a black horn of the earth, and no light lingers long beside it.

cards.name: AmonSul
cards.quote: Weathertop remembers moonlight, blade, and the long ache of old days.

cards.name: CamethBrin
cards.quote: CamethBrin rises over the fields like a warning that never forgot how to speak.

cards.name: CarnDum
cards.quote: CarnDum stands hard against the North, and even its ruin looks carved for endurance.

cards.name: FennasDrunin
cards.quote: At FennasDrunin, the water is still enough to hide danger and patient enough to keep it.

cards.name: FornostErain
cards.quote: Fornost lies like a fallen crown upon the North.

cards.name: Forochel
cards.quote: Under the hard sky of Forochel, even silence has a stern voice.

cards.name: Gundabad
cards.quote: Gundabad bears the deep memory of the North, grim as a mountain scar that never closed.

cards.name: Minas Morgul
cards.quote: Minas Morgul burns with a pale malice, and the road to it seems to remember fear.

cards.name: MtGram
cards.quote: MtGram stands with a dwarf-fast stubbornness, as though the hill itself had taken a vow.

cards.name: ErynVorn
cards.quote: ErynVorn keeps the old forestÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â€žÂ¢s memory under its boughs, green and unbowed in the dusk.

cards.name: Angmarin
cards.quote: March forth, children of darkness, to claim what is ours.

cards.name: Olog Hai
cards.quote: Brutality incarnate, they charge with the wrath of a mountain's fall.

cards.name: Ruins Spiders
cards.quote: From the ruins, we emerge, hungry and waiting.

cards.name: Snow Trolls
cards.quote: Frost and fury, we crush all beneath our icy might.

cards.name: Stone Trolls
cards.quote: Stubborn as the mountains, we are the unforgiving.

cards.name: Undead
cards.quote: Once they lived, now they serve only darkness.

cards.name: War Trolls
cards.quote: Foul beasts of war, they trample all beneath their monstrous feet.

cards.name: Wood Trolls
cards.quote: In the heart of the forest, we are the giants that walk.

cards.name: Wolves
cards.quote: The howl of the pack heralds the hunt's beginning.

cards.name: Broggha
cards.quote: In my shadow, even the stars dare not shine.
cards.actionEffect: Recruit 2 li <sprite name="li"> to a controlled army.

cards.name: Mauhir
cards.quote: Swift as the wind, I am the blade that strikes first.
cards.actionEffect: Recruit 2 ma <sprite name="ma"> to a controlled army.

cards.name: Erestor
cards.quote: Wisdom is the light that guides through the darkest paths.
cards.actionEffect: Increase Emmissary <sprite name="emmissary"> by 1 on a random controlled character.

cards.name: Arfanhil
cards.quote: From ashes shall rise the fire that consumes our foes.
cards.actionEffect: Upgrade fort <sprite name="fort"> on a random controlled settlement.

cards.name: Barrow-wight
cards.quote: Flee, mortals, lest you join the forgotten of the earth.
cards.actionEffect: Conceal a random controlled settlement from enemies for 1 turn(s).

cards.name: Ladders
cards.quote: With ladders raised, we breach the walls and bring the fight to our foes.

cards.name: The Iron Crown
cards.quote: Angmar was built from grief not yet spent. Let the Men of Arnor count their sorrows and know whose hand arranged them.
cards.actionEffect: Upgrade fort <sprite name="fort"> on a random controlled settlement.

cards.name: Cruel Winter
cards.quote: The biting cold is my ally, and despair is my weapon.
cards.actionEffect: Bitter cold tests every army in the passes. Own mountain specialists gifted. Own mountain non-specialists slowed. Enemy cavalry 20-25% freeze. Enemy mountain units 15% freeze; commanders halted in dark version; enemy armies -8% attack. Adds Frozen.

cards.name: Raid From The Mountains
cards.quote: The mountains whisper of swift vengeance; the raiders heed the call.
cards.actionEffect: All allied army commanders in mountains or hills gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn) and Courage <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Struck by a Morgul Blade
cards.quote: A wound that festers, a touch of the dark arts.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply MorgulTouch (3 turns).

cards.name: TheIronCrownRidesAgain
cards.quote: Rise, my dark steed, and let the night reclaim the sky.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied Nazgul in your hex gains +1 Commander and +1 Mage.

cards.name: Caradhras
cards.quote: The mountain stirs, a chill creeping through the hearts of the unprepared.
cards.actionEffect: The Cruel Mountain turns on those who trespass. Own mountain natives buffed. Own non-native mountain slowed. Enemy mountain emissaries gain Arcane Insight. Enemy mountain units 30-40% frozen; commanders halted.

cards.name: Barrow Chill
cards.quote: Cold graves send a quieter fear than any shout.
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in radius 2 gain Frozen <sprite name="frozen"> for 1 turn, and the weakest enemy is Blocked <sprite name="blocked"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Barrow Lilies
cards.quote: White blooms at the barrow's edge carry a grief no plough can lift.
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in radius 2 gain Despair <sprite name="despair"> (2).

cards.name: BarrowWightWhisper
cards.quote: The dead whisper from the barrows, and the living grow pale at the sound.
cards.actionEffect: Enemies in radius 2 gain Fear <sprite name="fear"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Old Ruins of Arthedain
cards.quote: Broken kings still leave a brightness in the stones.
cards.actionEffect: Arthedain, Cardolan, and Rhudaur each reveal 2 hexes as seen for 1 turn.

cards.name: Weathertop
cards.quote: On the watch hill, the stone itself seems to command stillness.
cards.actionEffect: The old watchtower commands all approaches — and traps those who hold it. All units here gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> and Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> but are Halted <sprite name="halted"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Old Man Willow Song
cards.quote: The old wood hums, and the unwary forget the way.
cards.actionEffect: All Hobbit characters in radius 1 are tangled by the old wood: gain Blocked <sprite name="blocked"> and Halted <sprite name="halted"> for 2 turns.

cards.name: The Sack of Bag End
cards.quote: When the halls stood empty, hungry hands came softly in the dusk.
cards.actionEffect: Steal one transferable artifact from a random enemy character in your hex, if any are present.

cards.name: Hillmen
cards.quote: From the heights they descend, swift as the autumn storms.

cards.name: Mounted Hillmen
cards.quote: Riders of the hills, they strike like thunder on the plains.

cards.name: Raise the Inner Bastion
cards.quote: Stone laid upon stone is memory made useful against the dark.
cards.actionEffect: Increase the fort level of your PC in this hex by 1.

cards.name: Cardolan
cards.quote: Cardolan keeps old roads under the grass.

cards.name: Ungol
cards.quote: In the shadow of the mountain, the darkness stirs with ancient malice.

cards.name: Uncautious Supper
cards.quote: A flame unwatched at meal may summon the long eye of night.
cards.actionEffect: At supper or rest, Hobbits in radius 2 lose Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> and take 15 damage.

cards.name: WhatDoesMordorCommand
cards.quote: From the depths of ash and shadow, we rise to reclaim our dominion.
cards.actionEffect: All allies in radius 1 gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> and Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: The Witch-king's Decree
cards.quote: No edict from Angmar arrives without a shadow at its back.
cards.actionEffect: None dispute the Witch-king’s decree. Allied Nazgul in radius 2 gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> (2); enemies in radius 1 gain Fear <sprite name="fear"> (2).

cards.name: Orc-host of Angmar
cards.quote: The mountain passes do not empty; they refill.
cards.actionEffect: Allied Orc armies in radius 2 gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn) and Courage <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Frozen Passes
cards.quote: The road north gives more than cold to those who tread it unwelcomed.
cards.actionEffect: Ice seals the mountain paths against all but those who belong there. Own mountain creatures gifted. Own non-native mountain units slowed slightly. Enemy mountain emissaries gain Arcane Insight. Enemy mountain units 30% frozen and halted; cavalry loses troops. Adds Frozen (1 turn) and Halted <sprite name="halted"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Shade of the Barrow-king
cards.quote: The grave-gold of Cardolan still calls to the hand that knew it first.
cards.actionEffect: The Barrow-wight remembers old oaths and older grudges. Steal 1 transferable artifact from a random enemy in radius 1; that enemy gains Fear <sprite name="fear"> and Despair <sprite name="despair">.

cards.name: Morgul Passage
cards.quote: The dark road cuts where no honest road dares run.
cards.actionEffect: The roads through Morgul Vale are not for the living. Teleport a target ally from your hex to any allied Nazgul’s hex within 5; they arrive Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened">.

cards.name: Dragon Hunters
cards.quote: When the sky burns, only the grim-willed stand close enough to answer.

cards.name: Thuringwathost
cards.quote: Thuringwathost bears the mark of old terror, and the land around it has not forgotten the touch.

cards.name: Dagorlad
cards.quote: Where the shadows of war linger, the ghosts of past battles still whisper.

cards.name: Murazor Unleashed
cards.quote: Angmar was forged in darkness, and I am its master unchained. Let no army stand against the shadow of my coming.
cards.actionEffect: Dark servant commanders in Angmar, Arthedain, Cardolan, Rhudaur, or mountain hexes gain +1 Commander and Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> on play. While active, dark servant armies contesting hexes in those regions or in mountains gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> each turn.

cards.name: Snow
cards.quote: The whiteness of winter takes what warmth the road remembers.
cards.actionEffect: Winter cold strikes hardest those who do not know its ways. Own mountain creatures gain Hidden each turn. Own non-mountain units slowed. Enemy 10% freeze chance, cavalry 20%. Own armies +5% attack. Adds Frozen for 1 turn.

cards.name: Muddy Lane
cards.quote: Even the mud may exact its due, till the purse and store are both made lighter.
cards.actionEffect: Mired roads slow all movement. The strongest enemy commander on the board loses resources to stuck caravans.

cards.name: Unquiet Dead
cards.quote: What is buried under old roots does not always stay buried.
cards.actionEffect: Death has no power over those who command it. Undead hasted; DS agents hidden. Own DS near enemies slowed. FP near allied settlements gain Hope. Enemies near Undead 25% slowed each turn; DS armies +8% attack. Adds Haste; enemies adjacent to any Undead may be slowed by the death aura.
